title: The Silver Chalice
actors: Virginia Mayo, Pier Angeli, Jack Palance
plot: A Greek artisan is commissioned to cast the cup of Christ in silver, and sculpt around its rim, the faces of the disciples and Jesus. He travels to Jerusalem and eventually to Rome to complete the task. Meanwhile, a nefarious inte...
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 1 win & 2 nominations total
